Atmospheric & Niche: A curated experience focused on mood and environment, featuring non-traditional soundscapes for relaxation, focus, or humor. Includes Ambient, Lo-fi, New Age, Drone, and Comedy.
Blues & Soul: A station dedicated to the soulful roots of modern music, delivering raw emotion through expressive vocals and rhythmic grooves. Includes Delta Blues, R&B, Motown, and Funk.
Classical & Stage: Broadcasts high-art musical traditions, from grand orchestral symphonies to the dramatic storytelling of the stage. Includes Baroque, Opera, and Film/TV Themes.
Country & Folk: Tuning in provides a storytelling journey through rural and traditional community cultures, emphasizing acoustic heritage. Includes Bluegrass, Americana, Celtic, and Zydeco.
Electronic & Dance: A high-energy channel utilizing digital synthesis and pulsing beats designed for the club and the dancefloor. Includes House, Techno, EDM, and Trance.
Hip-Hop & Rap: Focuses on the culture of beat-driven production and the art of stylized, rhythmic vocal delivery. Includes Trap, Drill, Grime, and Old School.
Jazz: Features technical mastery and sophisticated improvisation, highlighting complex harmonies and swing rhythms. Includes Bebop, Fusion, Acid Jazz, and Modal Jazz.
Latin & Caribbean: A vibrant station celebrating the percussive heat and rhythmic passion of Spanish, African, and Island traditions. Includes Reggae, Soca, Salsa, and Bossa Nova.
Pop: Broadcasts the most accessible sounds of the moment, focusing on catchy melodies and mainstream global appeal. Includes Synthpop, K-Pop, J-Pop, and Hyperpop.
Rock & Metal: The home of high-voltage energy, centered on the power of electric guitars, heavy drums, and a driving backbeat. Includes Alternative, Punk, Grunge, Heavy Metal, and Indie.
World & Regional: A global broadcast hub offering a window into traditional and contemporary musical expressions from every corner of the map. Includes Afrobeat, Bhangra, Hindustani, and Klezmer.
